docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASHCALL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLS, RICHARD $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,665.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF CASHCALL, INC., RETURNED "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
